mapper.select: SELECT * FROM TB_NOTICE WHERE NOTICE_NO >= (SELECT MAX(NOTICE_NO) - 10 FROM TB_NOTICE) AND NOTICE_NO <= (SELECT MAX(NOTICE_NO) FROM TB_NOTICE) ORDER BY NOTICE_NO DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_NOTICE SET NOTICE_TITLE = #{noticeTitle}, NOTICE_CONTENTS = #{noticeContents}, PROFESSOR_NO = #{professorNo}, NOTICE_DATE = SYSDATE, NOTICE_HITS = #{noticeHits} WHERE NOTICE_NO = #{noticeNo}
